corrective_fixes_applied.summary: SECURITY DEFINER helper public.facilitation_case_visible terminates the inline EXISTS chain in fevd_select/fevd_insert.
SECURITY DEFINER helpers (public.match_document_visible, public.document_access_visible) break the recursive chain between match_documents and document_access SELECT policies.
corrective_fixes_applied.scope: Pre-existing platform RLS recursion blocker, OUTSIDE the facilitation feature surface.

verification.before: Authenticated storage INSERT raised 'infinite recursion detected in policy for relation document_access'

corrective_fixes_applied.summary: Converted two storage.objects policies from PERMISSIVE to RESTRICTIVE. Permissive policies with USING (bucket_id <> '<denied>') were OR-combined and acted as broad allow-rules on every other bucket, bypassing stricter per-bucket policies. RESTRICTIVE preserves the original deny intent on the two named buckets without granting access to any other bucket.
policies_converted: No authenticated access to archived records
